metadata.description: Name of the environment (e.g., dev, prod)
Name of the Azure OpenAI chat deployment
Name of the Azure OpenAI embedding deployment
Azure AD tenant ID for authentication
Azure AD client ID for authentication
Set to true to reuse an existing Azure AI Foundry project instead of creating new AI resources
Name of the existing AI Services account (parent of the project)
Name of the existing AI Foundry project
Endpoint of the existing AI Foundry AI Services (for OpenAI + CU)
Name of the AI Search connection in the existing AI Foundry project
Set to true to also deploy Cosmos DB (not required — SQL is the primary database)

parameters.openaiName: [if(parameters('useExistingAiProject'), createObject('value', parameters('existingAiFoundryServiceName')), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourceGroup, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'openai'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value))]
parameters.cosmosName: [if(parameters('deployCosmos'), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourceGroup, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'cosmos'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value), createObject('value', ''))]
parameters.cuName: [if(parameters('useExistingAiProject'), createObject('value', parameters('existingAiFoundryServiceName')), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourceGroup, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'content-understanding'), '2025-04-01').outputs.name.value))]
